2606.21083.title: Coherence Under Commitment: Probing Generalization and Vacuous Memorization in LLM Logical Reasoning
2606.21083.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) deployed for logical reasoning in knowledge-intensive domains exhibit a subtle but critical failure: coherence can be vacuously achieved through systematic abstention. A model that withholds commitment to either entailment or refutation satisfies negation consistency while providing no utility. We introduce Coherence Under Commitment (CUC), a dual-query evaluation paradigm that jointly measures consistency and decisiveness. CUC contributes three innovations: (1) a commitment score $c(\varphi) = p(\varphi) + p(\lnot\varphi)$ quantifying probability mass allocated to decisive outcomes; (2) a \textbf{deterministic elicitation protocol} via normalized YES/NO log probabilities, eliminating sampling variance; and (3) a 3-way decision framework (True/False/Uncertain) operationalizing the coherence-commitment trade-off into metrics. Experiments on four open-weight LLMs (1B-3B) across 204 FOLIO examples expose a sharp frontier. Qwen2.5-3B achieves near-zero contradiction ($\mathbb{E}[v_{\mathrm{neg}}]{=}0.025$) but only $7.4\%$ coverage, while TinyLlama-1.1B reaches $79.4\%$ coverage with violations on every example. Coherence-only evaluation would rank the abstaining model first; CUC exposes this as vacuous, and the frontier generalizes to LogiQA~v2 ($ρ{=}0.97$). We argue that evaluation must report both coherence and non-vacuous commitment and release a toolkit for standardized assessment.
2606.21083.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在知識密集型領域中進行邏輯推理時，表現出一種微妙但關鍵的失敗：通過系統性的避免承諾可以虛無地實現一致性。一個對於推論或反駁都不作承諾的模型滿足否定一致性，但卻沒有提供任何效用。我們引入了承諾下的一致性（Coherence Under Commitment, CUC），這是一種雙查詢評估範式，聯合測量一致性和果斷性。CUC 貢獻了三項創新：（1）一個承諾分數 $c(\varphi) = p(\varphi) + p(\lnot\varphi)$，量化分配給果斷結果的概率質量；（2）通過標準化的 YES/NO 日誌概率的 \textbf{確定性引導協議}，消除抽樣變異；以及（3）一個三向決策框架（真/假/不確定），將一致性與承諾的權衡操作化為指標。在 204 個 FOLIO 範例上對四個開放權重的 LLM（1B-3B）進行的實驗顯示出一個明確的邊界。Qwen2.5-3B 實現了近零矛盾（$\mathbb{E}[v_{\mathrm{neg}}]{=}0.025$），但僅有 $7.4\%$ 的覆蓋率，而 TinyLlama-1.1B 則達到 $79.4\%$ 的覆蓋率，但每個範例都有違規。僅以一致性進行評估將使得避免承諾的模型排名第一；CUC 揭示了這一點是虛無的，並且邊界推廣到 LogiQA~v2 ($ρ{=}0.97$)。我們主張評估必須報告一致性和非虛無的承諾，並發布一個標準化評估的工具包。
2606.21083.author: Noor Islam S. Mohammad et.al.
2606.21083.authors: Noor Islam S. Mohammad, Mahmudul Hasan
